english_examples: [{"en": "He made a desperate attempt to smile.", "cn": "他拼命挤出一丝微笑。"}, {"en": "The prisoners are desperate for freedom.", "cn": "囚犯们极度渴望自由。"}]
collocations: [{"phrase": "be desperate for", "meaning": "渴望..."}, {"phrase": "a desperate situation", "meaning": "绝境"}]
context: [{"situation": "考研阅读", "example": "The company is in desperate need of reform.", "translation": "公司迫切需要改革。"}, {"situation": "日常口语", "example": "I'm desperate for a glass of water.", "translation": "我渴得要命。"}]
memory_aid: 词根记忆：de(去掉) + sper(希望) + ate -> 去掉了希望 -> 绝望的。

english_examples: [{"en": "We reached our destination at last.", "cn": "我们终于到达了目的地。"}]
collocations: [{"phrase": "tourist destination", "meaning": "旅游胜地"}, {"phrase": "final destination", "meaning": "最终目的地"}]
context: [{"situation": "旅行规划", "example": "What is your final destination?", "translation": "你的终点站是哪里？"}, {"situation": "学术讨论", "example": "The destination of this research is clear.", "translation": "这项研究的目标很明确。"}]
memory_aid: 词根记忆：destin(预定) + ation -> 预定要到的地方 -> 目的地。

english_examples: [{"en": "No one can escape his destiny.", "cn": "没有人能逃脱他的命运。"}]
collocations: [{"phrase": "master of one's own destiny", "meaning": "掌握自己的命运"}]
context: [{"situation": "文学作品", "example": "It was her destiny to be a queen.", "translation": "她命中注定要成为女王。"}, {"situation": "演讲辞令", "example": "We hold our destiny in our hands.", "translation": "命运掌握在自己手中。"}]
memory_aid: 对比记忆：destination是地理上的终点，destiny是人生的终点（命运）。

context: [{"situation": "环境保护", "example": "The destruction of forests is a serious issue.", "translation": "森林破坏是一个严重的问题。"}, {"situation": "军事报道", "example": "The city faced total destruction.", "translation": "这座城市面临彻底毁灭。"}]
memory_aid: 词根记忆：de(去掉/反) + struct(建造) + ion -> 把造好的弄掉 -> 破坏。

english_examples: [{"en": "I spent the afternoon pulling up weeds.", "cn": "我花了一下午拔草。"}, {"en": "The new policy helps weed out poor students.", "cn": "新政策有助于淘汰差生。"}]
context: [{"situation": "职场管理", "example": "The interview is designed to weed out unsuitable candidates.", "translation": "面试旨在淘汰不合适的候选人。"}, {"situation": "园艺劳动", "example": "The garden is full of weeds.", "translation": "花园里长满了杂草。"}]
memory_aid: 联想记忆：杂草（weed）是多余的，所以动词就是“剔除”多余的部分。
